query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS member_distributions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entityId INT NOT NULL,
  boardMemberId INT NOT NULL,
  fiscalYear INT NOT NULL,
  distributionType ENUM('quarterly', 'annual', 'special', 'k1') NOT NULL,
  quarterNumber INT,
  grossAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  taxWithheld DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  netAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  ownershipPercentageAtTime DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  distributionDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'paid', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
  paymentReference VARCHAR(255),
  k1Issued BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  k1IssuedDate TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  approvedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS member_distributions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entityId INT NOT NULL,
  boardMemberId INT NOT NULL,
  fiscalYear INT NOT NULL,
  distributionType ENUM('quarterly', 'annual', 'special', 'k1') NOT NULL,
  quarterNumber INT,
  grossAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  taxWithheld DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0,
  netAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL,
  ownershipPercentageAtTime DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  distributionDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'paid', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
  paymentReference VARCHAR(255),
  k1Issued BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  k1IssuedDate TIMESTAMP,
  notes TEXT,
  approvedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
